title: ToolTreaux Basic Pottery Tools Modeling Clay Arts and Crafts Supplies Set - 8pc
description:
The ToolTreaux ceramics and pottery tool set comes with 8 essential tools for clay molding and sculpting. Inside the set you’ll find the following tools: a loop tool for removing clay, a ribbon tool for cutting and shaping, a needle tool for designing and placing, a potter’s rib for shaping and smoothing, a modeling tool for contouring, a metal scraper for trimming, a sponge for wetting clay, and a clay cutter. All of these basic tools are great for crafting with clay whether you’re a beginner or experienced potter. All of the tools included in this kit are made of durable and high-quality materials including stainless steel that won’t rust, polished hardwood and soft sponge

ToolTreaux Basic Pottery Tools Modeling Clay Arts and Crafts Supplies Set - 8pc

The ToolTreaux ceramics and pottery tool set comes with 8 essential tools for clay molding and sculpting. Inside the set you’ll find the following tools: a loop tool for removing clay, a ribbon tool for cutting and shaping, a needle tool for designing and placing, a potter’s rib for shaping and smoothing, a modeling tool for contouring, a metal scraper for trimming, a sponge for wetting clay, and a clay cutter. All of these basic tools are great for crafting with clay whether you’re a beginner or experienced potter.

Key Features

  • ESSENTIAL POTTERY TOOLS - ToolTreaux pottery tool set comes with 8 basic and essential tools for clay molding - loop tool for removing clay, ribbon tool for cutting and shaping, needle tool for designing and placing, potter’s rib for shaping and smoothing, modeling tool for contouring, metal scraper for trimming, sponge for wetting clay and clay cutter
  • HIGH-QUALITY CONSTRUCTION - All tools included are made of durable, high-quality materials like polished hardwood and stainless steel. Corrosion resistant steel won’t rust and all supplies are easy to clean (make sure to clean and dry thoroughly after each use)
  • STORAGE POUCH INCLUDED - Pottery tool set comes with included plastic carry pouch with sturdy zip closure to secure tools when not in use. All tools fit neatly inside and tool pouch is designed to fit in most standard tool boxes and hobby craft storage containers and organizers
  • VERSATILE CRAFTING TOOLS - Although designed for clay molding and ceramics, pottery tools are great for other crafting projects like working with polymers, 3D printing and other sculpting materials. Use with both soft and hard art supply mediums
  • SPECIFICATIONS - 8 piece set; Colors: chrome, wood, yellow; Materials: sponge, stainless steel, polished hardwood, plastic; Carry pouch included with zip closure; Dimensions: 9” x 3.75” x 1.5”

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TT8PCPOTST
  • UPC: 810058482273
  • Color: Multi Colored
  • Size: Medium

All of the tools included in this kit are made of durable and high-quality materials including stainless steel that won’t rust, polished hardwood and soft sponge. All of these potter’s supplies are easy to clean with soap and water - just make sure to clean and dry them thoroughly before and after each use to ensure longevity.

We’ve also included a plastic carry pouch with a sturdy zip closure to secure your pottery tools when not in use. All of the sculpting tools fit neatly inside the pouch and the pouch itself is designed to fit inside most standard tool or craft boxes as well as storage containers and organizers to keep your workspace clean and tidy.

Although these tools were specifically designed for clay molding and sculpting, you can also use them for other crafting projects including working with polymers, 3D printing materials and paint. Make sure to have a set of reliable potter’s tools before your next sculpting project!
